bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the card component for background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the card component for foreground.

border-color.$description: Material 3 color used by the card component for border color.

border-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the card component for border width.

radius.$description: M3 card container shape: md.sys.shape.corner.medium (12dp) via the material3 radius scale.

elevation.$description: M3 elevated card container elevation: md.sys.elevation.level1 via ki.elevation.e1 (replaces the migrated M2-era shadow pair).

gap.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the card component for gap.

media-padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the card component for media padding.

header-padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the card component for header padding.

body-padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the card component for body padding.

footer-padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the card component for footer padding.
